meaning: n.上锁的人,有锁的橱柜,锁扣装置,有锁的存物柜
examples: In the locker room, Amanda changed quickly.
The fresh food locker contains tortillas, fresh bread, breakfast rolls, and fresh fruits and vegetables.
Besides the meal and pantry food lockers, a fresh food locker is packed at KSC and installed on the shuttle 18 to 24 hours before launch.
Its locker seems designed mainly to be a ruse to sell more ringtones and games.
The product, called an online (or digital) locker, is aimed at the tech-savvy 14-to-24-year-old set.
